title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 99.640 - Master plan — municipalities authorized to prepare
text:
99.640.  Master plan — municipalities authorized to prepare. — The governing body of any municipality or county, which is not otherwise authorized to establish a planning agency with power to prepare a master plan for the physical development of the community, is hereby authorized and empowered to prepare such a master plan for the purposes of initiating and carrying out a land clearance project under this law.
(L. 1951 p. 300 § 24)
